name: おじvsおじ
short_description: A washed-up old dude stuck in a soul-crushing job and addicted to slot machines must spin like crazy and build the ultimate deck to survive waves of creepy-cute old guys in this fast-paced roguelite action game!
detailed_description:
# Creepy Yet Weirdly Cute "Oji" Are Coming for You!

A massive horde of ridiculously adorable old dudes is out to get you.

If they touch the protagonist—an unimpressive salaryman—he might just transform into an ultra-cute "Oji" himself...!?

But why are they attacking? And why do they look exactly like him?

Unravel the mystery behind these bizarre yet lovable "Oji" as you progress through the game!

# Mow Down the Oji Swarm with the Ultimate Power Build – A Thrill Ride of Action & Domination

The sheer despair of being completely surrounded by an army of Oji...

And the absolute rush when you manage to break through!

Not to mention the godlike power you feel when you complete the ultimate build!

From self-destructing mine-type Oji to rare Oji that flee from the player—each enemy has unique behavior patterns.

You'll need quick reflexes and sharp decision-making to survive!

# Spin That Slot! A Real-Time Deck-Building System Like No Other

Unlike legendary action games like Vampire Survivors and Brotato, deck-building in this game happens in real-time.

The action never stops—no pausing, no breathers, just pure chaos for 15 minutes straight!

Dodge, attack, spin the slot, and strategize your build—all at the same time.

It's a game designed for those who thrive in overtasked madness.

(And yeah... maybe I’m one of them too.)
